'''Zilar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]] and the [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]] during the [[Yevethan Purge]]. He was a member of the [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Senate Defense Council]].
